query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dealerships` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`franchiseBrands` json,
	`primaryBrand` varchar(100),
	`brandOverride` varchar(100),
	`logoUrlColor` text,
	`logoUrlMono` text,
	`logoSelectedUrl` text,
	`logoGenerationPrompt` text,
	`logoGeneratedDatetime` timestamp,
	`logoLocked` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`dealerWebsiteUrl` varchar(500),
	`addressStreet` varchar(255),
	`addressCity` varchar(100),
	`addressState` varchar(50),
	`addressZip` varchar(20),
	`mainPhone` varchar(30),
	`hoursOfOperation` text,
	`areaBucket` varchar(100),
	`dayPlan` varchar(20),
	`priority` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'High',
	`visitOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
	`visitStatus` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Not Started',
	`lastVisitDatetime` timestamp,
	`nextFollowUpDate` timestamp,
	`tags` json,
	`leadTemp` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'none',
	`quickNote` varchar(280),
	`socialInstagramUrl` varchar(500),
	`socialFacebookUrl` varchar(500),
	`socialTiktokUrl` varchar(500),
	`socialYoutubeUrl` varchar(500),
	`auditLastRunDatetime` timestamp,
	`auditSummaryWorking` text,
	`auditSummaryMissing` text,
	`auditStaffPagePresent` boolean,
	`auditStaffPhotosPresent` boolean,
	`auditStaffNotes` text,
	`auditOpportunityNotes` text,
	`proposalSlug` varchar(100),
	`proposalPublicUrl` varchar(500),
	`proposalLastGeneratedDatetime` timestamp,
	`headshotAddon` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`groupId` int,
	`totalViews` int DEFAULT 0,
	`uniqueViews` int DEFAULT 0,
	`ctaClicks` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdById` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `dealerships_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `dealerships_proposalSlug_unique` UNIQUE(`proposalSlug`)
);
